conformal_prediction.coverage_guarantee: 90% of true outcomes fall within [P_hat ± q_0.90]

architecture.secondary_branch: Disabled when --no-sharp is set; planned SHARP BiLSTM/GNN future scope
architecture.insitu_branch: MAG InSitu-MLP with SWIS feature slots zero-padded when --no-swis is set
architecture.image_branch: Disabled when --no-suit is set; planned SUIT UV image CNN future scope
architecture.fusion: Cross-Modal Attention 4-head 256-dim (X-ray as primary query; missing branches zero-context)

enabled_branches: SoLEXS+HEL1OS causal TCN over 30-minute, 22-feature X-ray/physics windows
MAG-only in-situ MLP using 8 MAG features plus zero-padded SWIS slots
used_data_sources: Aditya-L1 SoLEXS L1 soft X-ray count-rate features
Aditya-L1 HEL1OS L1 hard X-ray CdTe/CZT band features
Aditya-L1 MAG L2 in-situ magnetic context
Derived CWT QPP, Neupert, HXR/SXR, HXR spectral-index, and MAG geometry features
future_scope_data_sources: SDO/HMI SHARP magnetic-complexity LSTM and GNN branch
current_run.fusion: Cross-modal attention with missing branches passed as learned zero-context slots

physics_features.hxr_spectral_index: HEL1OS CdTe3/CZT2 power-law index γ (non-thermal: γ<4.5)
physics_features.alfven_mach_number: v_sw / v_Alfven at L1 (CME shock: M_A>1)
physics_features.cwt_qpp_bands: 4 QPP frequency bands from Morlet CWT (1-128s)

primary: Aditya-L1 SoLEXS L1 (1-s ZIP archives from PRADAN)
Aditya-L1 HEL1OS L1 (1-s CdTe+CZT from PRADAN)
future_scope: SDO/HMI SHARP magnetic-complexity LSTM and GNN branch
